audit.purpose: Inspection-only repository assessment with ranked issues and safest next move.
intentionallyNotChanged: Routes, components, and config not explicitly requested

surgical_fix.purpose: Small, bounded correction with strict diff containment.

implementation.purpose: Medium-scope delivery with declared boundaries and verification checklist.
implementation.expectedFileBehavior: Bounded set of files with explicit in-scope and out-of-scope summary.

design_media.purpose: Design-system and media-safe edits with minimal runtime risk.
design_media.expectedFileBehavior: Prefer config/content/asset wiring over architecture edits.
intentionallyNotChanged: Core app routing architecture unless explicitly requested
Server runtime internals unrelated to media/design scope

component_upgrade.purpose: Upgrade component-level design quality without broad page rewrites.
component_upgrade.expectedFileBehavior: Focused component changes with clear hierarchy and CTA outcomes.

page_experience_upgrade.purpose: Upgrade full-page experience quality with strict narrative and CTA structure gates.
page_experience_upgrade.expectedFileBehavior: Section-level upgrades that preserve trusted architecture boundaries.

asset_system.purpose: Plan and stage design/media assets with restrained consistency gate checks.
asset_system.expectedFileBehavior: Asset briefs, mapping, and controlled integration notes.

design_system_enforcement.purpose: Enforce consistent tokens, hierarchy patterns, and premium visual restraint.
design_system_enforcement.expectedFileBehavior: Targeted consistency updates with reusable patterns.
intentionallyNotChanged: Content-heavy rewrites not tied to consistency objectives

refactor.purpose: Explicitly approved structural change with risk documentation and rollback plan.
refactor.expectedFileBehavior: Broad but intentional edits with elevated review burden.
intentionallyNotChanged: Infrastructure/deployment settings unless in approved refactor scope
